message:
🐛 Fix deploy dashboard order, arcade flappy position, and game loop bugs (#295)

* 🌱 Move Flappy Pod to last position in arcade

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix deploy dashboard default card order

Move workloads, cluster groups, and missions to the top row
(w:4 each = 1/3 width), with resource marshall on the next row.
The previous change only modified templates.ts which only affects
explicit template application, not default card layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix KubeKart and KubeKong game loop stability

KubeKart:
- Fix game loop restarting every frame due to raceTime/bestTime
  in update callback dependencies. Use refs for stable game loop.
- Fix AI kart screen positioning: track accumulated distance per
  AI kart instead of broken checkpoint-based calculation that
  caused AI karts to immediately fly off screen.
- Fix AI steering: compute effective screen Y for curve tracking
  instead of using stale initial Y position.
- Fix race position calculation: use actual distance traveled.

KubeKong:
- Fix game loop setInterval being recreated every frame because
  draw callback (which depends on player/barrels state) was in
  the effect dependency array. Use drawRef for stable game loop.
- This fixes barrels never spawning (barrelSpawnCounter reset to
  0 every frame) and help text never blinking.
- Fix barrel-jump scoring: deduplicate so jumping over a barrel
  only scores once per barrel instead of every frame.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
